description: Use this API to return the number of array entries required to accommodate the data to be returned by the remaining members of the substation node data family. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.1.0. ierr, nodes = anodecount(sid, flag)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem substations to include. (input; 1 by default).

return_values.name: nodes
return_values.description: Number of substation nodes in the subsystem indicated by sid that meet the editing criteria indicated by flag. (output).

error_codes.description: Working case is empty; NODES returned as 0.
Invalid SID value; NODES returned as 0.
Invalid FLAG value; NODES returned as 0.
